𝗡𝗬𝗫 | Cleaning forensic traces and sensitive data from operating systems to enhance privacy and security.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Cleaning forensic traces and sensitive data from operating systems to enhance privacy and security.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Cross-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows)
✅ Comprehensive artifact cleaning (shell history, logs, network, user data, browsers, applications)
✅ Modular design for targeted cleaning
✅ Self-contained script for ease of use
✅ Alpha software with ongoing development


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 371 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 31 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Nyx is a self-contained shell script designed to clean forensic traces across Linux, macOS, and Windows operating systems. It systematically removes artifacts related to shell history, logs, network activity, user data, browsers, and various applications to help maintain system privacy and security.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/evilsocket/nyx

𝗦𝗛𝗜𝗭𝗨𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗟 | To provide users with granular control over application network access on Android devices without requiring root privileges or a VPN connection, enhancing privacy and reducing data usage.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with granular control over application network access on Android devices without requiring root privileges or a VPN connection, enhancing privacy and reducing data usage.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✅ No root or VPN required
✅ Per-app system networking control
✅ Privacy-first design
✅ Leverages Shizuku or local ADB daemon


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ShizuWall is a lightweight Android firewall application that allows users to block network connections for specific apps without needing root access or a VPN. It utilizes the Shizuku service or a local ADB daemon to manage network permissions on a per-app basis, offering a privacy-focused solution.

𝗗𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 | Managing personal schedules and important dates directly within the terminal environment.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing personal schedules and important dates directly within the terminal environment.
📅 Created: Feb 2023 • Updated: Feb 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Dynamic calendar view with color-coded events and filtering
✅ Static monthly calendar view
✅ Event calculator for workdays and timespans
✅ Calendar data management (add, delete, update, import, export)
✅ Support for multiple calendars and public holidays
✅ Interactive event adding and updating


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 282 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 5 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

dLine is a command-line calendar tool designed for terminal enthusiasts. It allows users to view monthly calendars, track events, calculate timespans between dates, and manage multiple calendar datasets directly from their terminal.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗜𝗘𝗥 | To reduce resource consumption and operational costs by automatically managing the lifecycle of containerized applications, ensuring they are only active when actively being used.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To reduce resource consumption and operational costs by automatically managing the lifecycle of containerized applications, ensuring they are only active when actively being used.
📅 Created: Oct 2020 • Updated: Feb 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Starts containers on demand
✅ Automatically shuts down inactive containers
✅ Docker, Docker Swarm Mode, and Kubernetes compatible
✅ Integrates with reverse proxies (Traefik, Caddy, Nginx, Envoy, etc.)
✅ Provides a waiting page for users while containers start
✅ Optimizes resource usage for cost savings and efficiency


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 78 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 62 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Sablier is an open-source tool designed to manage containerized workloads by starting them only when needed and automatically shutting them down after a period of inactivity. It integrates with various reverse proxies and orchestration platforms like Docker, Docker Swarm, and Kubernetes to optimize resource usage.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉
